join_order.notes: mmap sub_adsh_hash (262144 slots x 8B = 2MB); probe adsh_code -> row_id; check sic[row_id] BETWEEN 4000 AND 4999 at probe time; retrieve sic[row_id] and cik[row_id]. Zero build cost (P11).

mmap tag_tv_hash (4194304 slots x 16B = 64MB); probe (tag_code, version_code) -> row_id using hash h = tag_code*2654435761ULL ^ version_code*40503ULL; check abstract[row_id] == 0 at probe time; retrieve tlabel[row_id]. Empty slot sentinel: tag_code == INT32_MIN (use std::fill, not memset -- C20). Zero build cost (P11).

Runtime open-addressing hash SET of (adsh_code, tag_code, version_code). Scan pre using pre_stmt_zone_map: skip blocks where max_val < eq_code || min_val > eq_code. ~1.06M qualifying rows. cap = next_pow2(1060000*2) = 2097152 (2^21). Slot: {int32_t adsh_code; int32_t tag_code; int32_t version_code; int32_t _pad} = 16B. Total: 2^21 * 16 = 32MB (fits L3=44MB). Sentinel: adsh_code == INT32_MIN (std::fill, C20). Bounded probing with for-loop (C24). Hash: composite_hash3(adsh_code, tag_code, version_code).

filters.method: dict_code_compare: int16_t usd_code = find_code(uom_dict, 'USD') at startup (C2)
filters.zone_map_skip: skip block if max_val < usd_code || min_val > usd_code

filters.method: std::isnan(value) check; skip row if NaN
dict_code_compare: int16_t eq_code = find_code(stmt_dict, 'EQ') at startup (C2)
filters.zone_map_skip: skip block if max_val < eq_code || min_val > eq_code; pre is sorted by stmt so EQ blocks are contiguous

filters.method: range_check at probe time: sic[row_id] >= 4000 && sic[row_id] <= 4999

data_structures.sub_lookup: pre_built_mmap_index: sub_adsh_hash (adsh_code -> row_id); 262144 slots x 8B = 2MB; sic/cik filtered at probe
data_structures.tag_lookup: pre_built_mmap_index: tag_tv_hash ((tag_code,version_code) -> row_id); 4194304 slots x 16B = 64MB; abstract filtered at probe
data_structures.pre_eq_hash: runtime open-addressing hash_set: key=(adsh_code,tag_code,version_code) packed 3xi32 + pad; cap=2097152; slot=16B; total=32MB; sentinel adsh_code=INT32_MIN via std::fill (C20); bounded for-loop probing (C24)
data_structures.aggregation: thread_local open-addressing hash_map: key=(sic:int32,tlabel_code:int32); value={sum_cents:int64,agg_count:int64,cik_set:flat_hash_set<int32>}; cap=8192 per thread (full group cardinality, C9); merge post-barrier (P20)
data_structures.cik_distinct: per-group flat_hash_set<int32_t> cik_set for COUNT(DISTINCT s.cik); evaluated during merge for HAVING >= 2

parallelism.build_pre_eq_hash: single-threaded (32MB build, fast zone-map scan of pre)
parallelism.scan_num: parallel morsel-driven over 39.4M num rows; each thread holds own agg hash map (cap=8192) and cik_sets
parallelism.aggregation_merge: sequential merge of thread-local maps post-barrier (~5K groups x nthreads; fast); apply HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT cik) >= 2 during merge (P17)

indexes.purpose: skip non-USD blocks during num scan; 395 blocks of 100K rows
skip non-EQ blocks during pre build scan; 97 blocks of 100K rows
zero-cost adsh_code -> sub row_id lookup; sic/cik retrieved from sub column arrays
zero-cost (tag_code,version_code) -> tag row_id lookup; abstract/tlabel retrieved from tag column arrays

aggregation.notes: p.stmt is constant 'EQ' (single-value filter) — store eq_code as scalar, output literal at decode; GROUP BY key is effectively (sic, tlabel_code) (C15)

aggregates.impl: per-group flat_hash_set<int32_t> cik_set; insert cik[sub_row_id] each match; size() at output
int64_t sum_cents += llround(value * 100.0) per qualifying row (C29)

precision.reason: n.value max=1e14 exceeds double safe-accumulation threshold of 1e13

output.sort_impl: std::partial_sort or fixed min-heap of 500 (O(n log 500))
decode: stmt output: literal 'EQ' string (constant filter value)

hash_capacities.agg_thread_local: next_pow2(5000 * 2) = 8192 per thread — full group cardinality, not groups/nthreads (C9)
